recommendation_summary: Recommend the balanced FP/min 2.0 engineering gate for owner approval before any G/H/I execution.
rationale: This candidate is the lowest reported FP/min operating point where Tier 1, Tier 2, and Tier 3 mismatch summaries all retain about 0.039 event recall, quantization degradation is negligible, mismatch recall degradation is small, committed median latency is about 150 ms, and one-alarm-per-burst fraction remains close to recall. It is strong enough to make Stage G/H/I meaningful while avoiding the high-FP permissiveness of the 5.0 FP/min gate.
owner_action_required: Project owner must approve the candidate gate and then regenerate or revalidate readiness before G/H/I execution.
approval_text: I approve candidate gate CAND_2C_BALANCED_FP2 as the Phase 5_2C engineering target. This is an engineering gate for G/H/I execution and Brian2 gate evaluation, not a clinical deployment claim.
qc_reason: recommendation is not active until owner approval; no readiness state was changed
